name: Mistress Of The Tower
short_description: Welcome to Mistress Of The Tower! Discover a... highly dubious school for wizards, where you can learn to build huge towers. Well... in theory. In practice, expect spectacular collapses and twisted challenges, alone or with 4 players!
detailed_description:
Future update

Mistress Of The Tower has been cut back in content. Updates will be made to bring it up to my initial expectations.


About the Game

Welcome to Mistress Of The Tower, a school for... dubious wizards, to learn how to build huge towers to light up the world. Well... in theory. In practice, expect spectacular collapses and twisted challenges!

🔷 Build, stack, but above all... hold on! Accumulate maximum points as you erect your tower. But beware: a poorly thought-out structure is guaranteed to collapse in a cloud of dust and debris!

🔷 Unforgiving laws of physics Each block obeys gravity, forces, collisions... and your clumsiness. One wrong move and you're guaranteed disaster! Place your blocks with precision and strategy to avoid chaos.

🔷 Every block you place earns you points, and every block you lose is penalized. In these conditions, your challenge can quickly turn into a nightmare.

🔷 With your tower, reach your team's bonuses and dodge malus to preserve your blocks from destruction.

🔷 Want to relax? Stacker mode is for you! Simply stack your blocks in peace and good spirits!

🔷 Want to fight? Builder mode is for you! The turrets are coming! Ignite, freeze, and shock the insolent ones who dare to attack you! Protect your tower and become the greatest builder!

🔷 To add variety, 3 levels of difficulty and 3 challenges:

  • The Infinite Tower (the only limit to the height of your tower is your incompetence);

  • The Tower of Time (build the tallest tower before time runs out);

  • The Chubby Tower (build the tallest tower without exceeding the height limit).

In short, only stuff related to towers.

🔷 Alone or with friends, let the competition begin! Play solo or take on up to 4 friends locally:

🎮 Keyboard: Up to 4 players (watch out for pudgy fingers and cheaters!)

🎮 Controller: Up to 2 players per controller

Ready to take on the challenge and defy the laws of balance?

Happy magical New Year in Mistress Of The Tower!
